title: View all items within the folder when click on folder name
excerpt: Why can’t we click on a folder name and see everything on one view that is inside the folder? As it is, you have to click on each board, one at a time, but there is no way to see everything in that folder together unless…

posts.author: mshubes (Michele Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Why can’t we click on a folder name and see everything on one view that is inside the folder? As it is, you have to click on each board, one at a time, but there is no way to see everything in that folder together unless you create a dashboard.
